description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester in Formotion design, with green ribbed crew neck, mesh panels on front and back and logo print on the chestFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoLightweight and quick drying, this black tee from adidas gives a great comfortable feel and looks stylish too. The FORMOTION™ design gives you more freedom of motion and the mesh panels on the tee keeps you dry and comfortable throughout an active day or hectic training schedules. Team this with adidas tracks and shoes for an action filled day at the Sports club or for working out.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
